channel.title: Papers on Guy Ohayon
channel.description: Recent content in Papers on Guy Ohayon

item.title: Posterior-Mean Rectified Flow: Towards Minimum MSE Photo-Realistic Image Restoration (preprint)
item.description: Posterior-Mean Rectified Flow (PMRF) is a novel photo-realistic image restoration algorithm. It (provably) approximates the optimal estimator that minimizes the Mean Squared Error (MSE) under a perfect perceptual quality constraint.

item.title: Perceptual Fairness in Image Restoration (NeurIPS 2024)
item.description: We propose a new definition of fairness for image restoration algorithms, draw its connection to previous ones, study its theoretical properties, and demonstrate its practical utility.

item.title: The Perception-Robustness Tradeoff in Deterministic Image Restoration (ICML 2024)
item.description: We prove that the Lipschitz constant of a deterministic restoration algorithm grows to infinity as the algorithm approaches perfect perceptual quality and perfect consistency with the measurements.

item.title: Deep Optimal Transport: A Practical Algorithm for Photo-realistic Image Restoration (NeurIPS 2023)
item.description: We propose an image restoration algorithm that can control the perceptual quality and/or the mean square error (MSE) of any pre-trained model, trading one over the other at test time.

item.title: High-Perceptual Quality JPEG Decoding via Posterior Sampling (CVPR 2023 Workshop)
item.description: We propose a novel JPEG decoding GAN-based algorithm that samples from the posterior distribution

item.title: Reasons for the Superiority of Stochastic Estimators over Deterministic Ones: Robustness, Consistency and Perceptual Quality (ICML 2023)
item.description: We reveal fundamental advantages of stochastic image restoration algorithms over deterministic ones.

item.title: High Perceptual Quality Image Denoising With a Posterior Sampling CGAN (ICCV 2021 Workshop)
item.description: We propose a novel CGAN algorithm that avoids the mode collapse issue and samples from the posterior distribution
